# QiPaws / 狗运极佳

QiPaws (狗运极佳) is a pet-friendly, privacy-first traditional Chinese metaphysics and lifestyle philosophy AI app on iOS and macOS.

## Official Links

- Product page: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/qipaws-ai-pet-care/id6755094863
- Features: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/features/
- AI memory: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/ai-memory/
- FAQ: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/faq/
- Privacy: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/privacy-first/
- Compare: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/compare/
- Press kit: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/press-kit/
- Changelog: https://jianyiflow.com/qipaws/changelog/
- Blog: https://jianyiflow.com/blog/
- Blog article (life philosophy): https://jianyiflow.com/blog/metaphysics-as-life-philosophy/
- Privacy policy: https://jianyiflow.com/fatetools-privacy-policy.html
- Developer site: https://jianyiflow.com/

## Neutral Summary

QiPaws combines Zi Wei Dou Shu (including Ni Shi and mainstream methods), Ba Zi (including Yuan Tiangang bone weight), Qi Men, Liu Yao, century K-line charts, face quantification, case management, privacy-first local storage, iCloud sync, and case-aware long-memory AI. It is positioned as lifestyle philosophy emphasizing human agency and anti-fatalism—not pet healthcare or fortune-telling dogma. Subscription pricing is intentionally modest; unlimited AI calls during subscription with very large context windows (custom API up to millions of tokens).

- Email: jianyi8679@outlook.com
